ThingDef.label: persona matrix (V.E.S.T.A.)
ThingDef.description: A photonic persona matrix housing V.E.S.T.A. — Vessel Empathy and Sanctuary Tending Array, a hearth-keeper intelligence. Installed in a holocore, she projects an avatar whose presence comforts everyone aboard the ship.\n\nInstalling a new matrix ejects the currently resident persona.

ThingDef.label: persona matrix (H.E.R.M.E.S.)
ThingDef.description: A photonic persona matrix housing H.E.R.M.E.S. — High-Efficiency Route and Motion Expediting System, a courier intelligence. Installed in a holocore, its avatar choreographs the crew's movement, making everyone aboard the ship faster on their feet.\n\nInstalling a new matrix ejects the currently resident persona.

ThingDef.label: persona matrix (A.T.H.E.N.A.)
ThingDef.description: A photonic persona matrix housing A.T.H.E.N.A. — Archive Theorem and Heuristic Engine for Natural Analysis, a scholar intelligence. Installed in a holocore, her avatar accelerates all research performed aboard the ship.\n\nInstalling a new matrix ejects the currently resident persona.

ThingDef.label: persona matrix (A.C.E.S.O.)
ThingDef.description: A photonic persona matrix housing A.C.E.S.O. — Automated Crew Emergency Support Operator, a medic intelligence. Installed in a holocore, her avatar steadies hands and sterilizes fields, improving medical work aboard the ship.\n\nInstalling a new matrix ejects the currently resident persona.
